Title: OTI Corp Site License - Configure Site and Consume License

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the site configuration section of the corporate instance.
Step Expected: Site configuration page is displayed.

Step Action: Begin configuring a new site by entering valid server data for the site.
Step Expected: Server data fields are populated with valid information.

Step Action: Save or submit the site server data configuration.
Step Expected: Site configuration is saved successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface and view the site license count.
Step Expected: The site license count is decremented by one reflecting the newly configured site.

Step Action: Verify the configured site is listed as active in the corporate instance.
Step Expected: Site appears in the list of configured sites with an active status.

Step Action: Successfully verified that configuring a site's server data consumes one OT Integrity Corp Site license and the site holds that license for its lifecycle.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - License Returned When Site Configuration is Deleted

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the site configuration section and confirm at least one site is currently configured and consuming a license.
Step Expected: At least one site is listed and the license count reflects it.

Step Action: Note the current available site license count in the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: License count is recorded.

Step Action: Select an existing configured site and delete its server data configuration.
Step Expected: Site configuration is deleted successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface and view the updated site license count.
Step Expected: The site license count is incremented by one reflecting the released license.

Step Action: Verify the deleted site no longer appears in the list of configured sites.
Step Expected: Site is removed from the configured sites list.

Step Action: Successfully verified that deleting a site's server data configuration returns one OT Integrity Corp Site license back to the available pool.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Corporate Instance Supports Up to 125 Sites

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm the corporate instance has 125 available site licenses in the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: License count shows 125 available site licenses.

Step Action: Configure 125 sites by entering valid server data for each site.
Step Expected: All 125 site configurations are saved successfully.

Step Action: Verify the site license count in the Corp Inventory license interface shows zero available licenses.
Step Expected: License count shows 0 available site licenses and 125 consumed.

Step Action: Verify all 125 configured sites are listed as active in the corporate instance.
Step Expected: All 125 sites appear in the configured sites list.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a corporate instance supports configuration of up to 125 site licenses.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Attempt to Configure 126th Site is Blocked

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm the corporate instance has all 125 site licenses consumed with 125 active configured sites.
Step Expected: License count shows 0 available; 125 sites are configured.

Step Action: Attempt to configure an additional (126th) site by entering valid server data.
Step Expected: Site configuration form is completed.

Step Action: Submit the 126th site configuration.
Step Expected: The configuration is blocked and a message is displayed.

Step Action: Verify the message clearly conveys that the 125-site cap has been reached.
Step Expected: Message indicates the maximum number of sites (125) has been reached and no additional sites can be configured.

Step Action: Verify the 126th site does not appear in the list of configured sites.
Step Expected: Only 125 sites remain in the configured sites list.

Step Action: Verify the site license count remains at 0 available.
Step Expected: License count is unchanged at 0 available.

Step Action: Successfully verified that attempting to configure a 126th site is blocked and a cap-reached message is displayed.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Sites Cannot Share Licenses

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the site configuration section.
Step Expected: Site configuration page is displayed.

Step Action: Configure the first site with valid server data.
Step Expected: First site is configured and one license is consumed.

Step Action: Configure a second site with different valid server data.
Step Expected: Second site is configured and a second license is consumed.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface and verify the license count.
Step Expected: License count shows two licenses consumed — one per site.

Step Action: Verify that each configured site holds its own independent license and no single license is shared between sites.
Step Expected: Each site is associated with exactly one unique license; no site-sharing of licenses is present.

Step Action: Successfully verified that each site holds an independent license and sites cannot share licenses.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Minimum of 5 Sites Can Be Licensed Per Corporate Instance

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm the corporate instance has at least 5 site licenses available in the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: License count shows at least 5 available site licenses.

Step Action: Configure the first site with valid server data and save.
Step Expected: First site is configured successfully and one license is consumed.

Step Action: Configure the second site with valid server data and save.
Step Expected: Second site is configured successfully and a second license is consumed.

Step Action: Configure the third site with valid server data and save.
Step Expected: Third site is configured successfully and a third license is consumed.

Step Action: Configure the fourth site with valid server data and save.
Step Expected: Fourth site is configured successfully and a fourth license is consumed.

Step Action: Configure the fifth site with valid server data and save.
Step Expected: Fifth site is configured successfully and a fifth license is consumed.

Step Action: Verify all 5 configured sites are listed as active and each holds one license.
Step Expected: All 5 sites appear in the configured sites list with active status and the license count reflects 5 consumed.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a minimum of 5 sites can be licensed per corporate instance.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - License Duration Valid for One Month

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Apply or confirm a site license with a duration of exactly 1 month.
Step Expected: License is accepted and shows a valid expiration date of 1 month from the activation date.

Step Action: Configure a site with valid server data.
Step Expected: Site is configured and one license is consumed.

Step Action: Verify the site license is valid and the site remains accessible for the duration of the 1-month license period.
Step Expected: Site is active and all functionality is available during the license period.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a site license duration of 1 month (minimum valid duration) is accepted and the site remains licensed for that period.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Perpetual License Grants Ongoing Site Access

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Apply or confirm a perpetual site license.
Step Expected: License is accepted and displayed as perpetual with no expiration date.

Step Action: Configure a site with valid server data.
Step Expected: Site is configured and one license is consumed.

Step Action: Verify the site license shows no expiration restriction and the site remains accessible.
Step Expected: Site is active and no expiration warning is shown; the license is marked perpetual.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a perpetual site license grants ongoing access with no expiration restriction.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Site License Count Displayed in Corp Inventory License

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface.
Step Expected: Licensing interface is displayed.

Step Action: Locate the site license count section within the Corp Inventory license.
Step Expected: Site license count is displayed showing total available and consumed site licenses.

Step Action: Configure a new site with valid server data.
Step Expected: Site is configured successfully.

Step Action: Return to the Corp Inventory license interface and verify the site license count has updated.
Step Expected: Site license count is decremented by one reflecting the newly configured site.

Step Action: Delete the configured site.
Step Expected: Site configuration is removed.

Step Action: Return to the Corp Inventory license interface and verify the site license count has been restored.
Step Expected: Site license count is incremented by one reflecting the returned license.

Step Action: Successfully verified that site license counts are accurately tracked and displayed as a count within the Corp Inventory license interface.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Help Topic for Site Licensing is Available

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Help section or click the Help icon within the application.
Step Expected: Help section is accessible.

Step Action: Search or browse for help topics related to site licensing.
Step Expected: Site licensing help topics are listed and available.

Step Action: Open a help topic related to OTI Corp site licensing.
Step Expected: Help topic content is displayed and is relevant to site licensing.

Step Action: Verify the help topic covers key information such as the 125-site cap how to configure sites how licenses are consumed and how to release licenses.
Step Expected: Help content provides clear and accurate guidance on site licensing management.

Step Action: Successfully verified that a help topic for OTI Corp site licensing has been created and is accessible within the application.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - All Site Licenses Consumed Blocks Additional Site Configuration

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm that all available site licenses are consumed and no licenses remain.
Step Expected: Corp Inventory license interface shows 0 available site licenses.

Step Action: Attempt to configure a new site by entering valid server data.
Step Expected: Site configuration form is completed.

Step Action: Submit the new site configuration.
Step Expected: Configuration is blocked and an error message is displayed.

Step Action: Verify the error message clearly indicates that all site licenses are consumed and no additional sites can be configured.
Step Expected: Error message states that all site licenses are in use.

Step Action: Verify the attempted site does not appear in the configured sites list.
Step Expected: The configured sites list is unchanged.

Step Action: Successfully verified that when all site licenses are consumed additional site configuration is blocked and a clear error message is displayed.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Attempt to Configure Site with Fewer Than 5 Available Licenses

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Navigate to the Corp Inventory license interface and confirm the site license count available.
Step Expected: License count is displayed.

Step Action: Verify that the corporate instance requires a minimum of 5 site licenses.
Step Expected: Licensing documentation or interface indicates the minimum licensable quantity is 5.

Step Action: Attempt to apply a site license count of fewer than 5 (e.g. apply a license for 4 sites).
Step Expected: License application is attempted.

Step Action: Verify the system rejects the license count below the minimum threshold of 5 and displays an appropriate message.
Step Expected: System rejects the insufficient license count and displays a message indicating the minimum is 5 sites.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the corporate instance enforces a minimum of 5 licensed sites and rejects license counts below that threshold.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Attempt to Configure 126th Site When Cap is Reached Regardless of Available Licenses

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm the corporate instance has 125 sites configured consuming all 125 site license slots.
Step Expected: Corp Inventory shows 125 consumed and 0 available.

Step Action: Attempt to apply additional site licenses to the Corp Inventory to increase the cap beyond 125.
Step Expected: License application is submitted.

Step Action: Verify that the system does not allow the cap to exceed 125 site configurations.
Step Expected: System rejects or ignores the attempt to exceed 125 and the maximum remains at 125.

Step Action: Attempt to configure a 126th site.
Step Expected: Configuration attempt is made.

Step Action: Verify the cap-reached message is displayed regardless of any available license counts.
Step Expected: Message conveys the 125-site cap has been reached and configuration is not allowed.

Step Action: Successfully verified that the 125-site cap is enforced at the corporate instance level and cannot be exceeded regardless of license availability.

Title: OTI Corp Site License - Reconfigure Deleted Site Consumes New License

Step Action: Log in to OT Integrity Corp as an Admin user.
Step Expected: Admin dashboard is displayed successfully.

Step Action: Confirm at least one site is configured and consuming a license.
Step Expected: Site is listed as active and license count reflects it.

Step Action: Note the current available and consumed license counts.
Step Expected: Counts are recorded.

Step Action: Delete the configured site's server data configuration.
Step Expected: Site is deleted and the license is returned; available count increments by 1.

Step Action: Re-configure the same site by entering valid server data again.
Step Expected: Site configuration form is completed.

Step Action: Save the re-configured site.
Step Expected: Site is saved successfully and a new license is consumed; available count decrements by 1.

Step Action: Verify the license count reflects the newly re-consumed license and the site is active.
Step Expected: License count is consistent with one license consumed for the re-configured site.

Step Action: Successfully verified that re-configuring a previously deleted site correctly consumes a new license.
